name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn



Init == 
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ turn = 1

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        /\ turn' = i
        /\ state' = [state' EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        /\ state' = [state' EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages



TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"INIT", "PREPARING", "COMMITTING", "ABORTING", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
  /\ messages \in [1..N -> {"", "PREPARE", "VOTE_YES", "VOTE_NO", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}]

Init == 
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "INIT"]
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> ""]

Next == 
  \/ /\ coordinator = "INIT"
     /\ coordinator' = "PREPARING"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "PREPARE"]
     /\ participants' = participants
  \/ /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
     /\ (\A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "VOTE_YES")
     /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTING"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "COMMIT"]
     /\ participants' = participants
  \/ /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "VOTE_NO"
     /\ coordinator' = "ABORTING"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "ABORT"]
     /\ participants' = participants
  \/ /\ coordinator = "COMMITTING"
     /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTED"
     /\ messages' = messages
     /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> "COMMITTED"]
  \/ /\ coordinator = "ABORTING"
     /\ coordinator' = "ABORTED"
     /\ messages' = messages
     /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> "ABORTED"]
  \/ /\ coordinator \in {"COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
     /\ coordinator' = coordinator
     /\ messages' = messages
     /\ participants' = participants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = philosopher who holds it *)
(* States: states[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = i /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = LeftFork(i), ![RightFork(i)] = RightFork(i)]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ CanEat(i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ TakeForks(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                j = i \/ flag[j] = FALSE \/ num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i)
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element *)
Enqueue(x) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \E x \in 1..K : Enqueue(x) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>
